features.label: Community Blocklist System
features.desc: Download and apply popular ad/tracker blocklists — EasyList, EasyPrivacy, Peter Lowe's List, Steven Black Hosts, Malware Domains. Network-level blocking via Electron webRequest API.
features.howto: Settings → Privacy & Performance → Blocklists → Download lists → blocking starts automatically.

features.label: Toolbar Shield Badge
features.desc: Address bar mein shield icon — current page pe blocked requests ka count dikhata hai. Tab switch pe automatically update hota hai.
features.howto: Kisi bhi site pe jao — shield icon pe number dikhega.

features.label: Custom Block Rules
features.desc: Apne custom domains add karo blocklist mein. Settings → Blocklists → Custom Rules section.
features.howto: Settings → Blocklists → Custom Rules → domain add karo.

features.label: Modular component architecture
features.desc: Blocklist system modular components mein — StatsCard, ListCard, CustomRules, UpdateBar. Separate main process modules — engine, downloader, parser, lists.
